Fixes # (issue number)

---

## 🔄 Type of Change | 变更类型

<!-- Check the relevant box | 勾选相关选项 -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔨 Refactoring
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition or correction
- [ ] 🐱 Six-Cat system improvement

---

### English
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

### 中文
<!-- 详细描述您的变更 -->

## 🧪 Testing | 测试

### English
<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them -->

### 中文
<!-- 描述您运行的测试以及如何重现它们 -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass | 单元测试通过
- [ ] Integration tests pass | 集成测试通过
- [ ] Manual testing performed | 已执行手动测试

**Test Configuration | 测试配置:**
- OS | 操作系统: [e.g. macOS, Linux]
- Python Version | Python 版本: [e.g. 3.10]

## 🐱 Six-Cat Review | 六猫审查

<!-- Which cats should review this PR? | 哪些猫咪应该审查此 PR？ -->

- [ ] 🍊 Zeus (Overall coordination | 整体协调)
- [ ] 🎀 Athena (Architecture review | 架构审查)
- [ ] 🐯 Hephaestus (Code review | 代码审查)
- [ ] 🔵 Apollo (Testing review | 测试审查)
- [ ] 🧶 Hermes (Integration review | 集成审查)
- [ ] ⚫ Artemis (Security review | 安全审查)

---

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable) | 截图（如适用）

<!-- Add screenshots to demonstrate your changes | 添加截图以展示您的变更 -->

---

## ✅ Checklist | 检查清单

### General | 一般
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines | 我的代码遵循项目的风格指南
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code | 我对自己的代码进行了自我审查
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas | 我对代码进行了注释，特别是在难以理解的区域
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation | 我对文档进行了相应的更改
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings | 我的更改没有产生新的警告

### Testing | 测试
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works | 我添加了测试来证明我的修复有效或功能正常
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes | 新的和现有的单元测试在本地与我的更改一起通过

### Security | 安全
- [ ] I have checked for potential security issues | 我已检查潜在的安全问题
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed | 没有敏感数据被暴露
- [ ] Input validation is implemented where needed | 在需要的地方实现了输入验证

---

## 📚 Documentation Updates | 文档更新

<!-- If applicable, describe documentation changes | 如果适用，描述文档更改 -->

- [ ] README updated | README 已更新
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated | CHANGELOG 已更新
- [ ] API documentation updated | API 文档已更新
- [ ] No documentation changes needed | 不需要文档更改

---

## 🎯 Migration Notes | 迁移说明

**Breaking Changes | 破坏性变更:** None | 无
